channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Port and Oil Refinery in Overnight Attack
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes damaged an oil tanker and refinery in Taganrog, and hit an oil depot in Armavir, marking an escalation in Kyiv's campaign against Russian energy infrastructure.

item.title: ☢️ Drone Strike Hits Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant, Russia and Ukraine Trade Blame
item.description: Russia's state nuclear agency said a Ukrainian drone struck a turbine hall at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant, leaving a hole in the wall. Kyiv denied responsibility.

item.title: ⚔️ Pentagon Chief Warns US Ready to Resume Iran Strikes If Peace Deal Fails
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US military is prepared to restart strikes on Iran if negotiations collapse, speaking at the Shangri-La defense forum in Singapore.

item.title: 🦠 Congo Ebola Outbreak Surpasses 260 Confirmed Cases as Spread Accelerates
item.description: The Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo has grown to 260 confirmed cases, with WHO and MSF warning the virus is spreading faster than the global response.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Accuses Trump of Stalling Talks With Excessive Demands
item.description: An Iranian official said Trump is making excessive demands that stall peace negotiations, as oil prices dip on reports a deal could be close but remains uncertain.

item.title: 🇫🇷 SoftBank Plans $88 Billion AI Data Hub in France
item.description: SoftBank founder Masayoshi Son announced the massive investment after meeting President Macron, with France's status as an energy exporter playing a key role in the decision.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Building Launch Pads Near Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: Satellite images reveal Beijing is building a web of military sites near its nuclear silos, with launch pads that could enhance China's strategic capabilities as its missiles can reach any US city.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇧🇦🇺 AUKUS Partners Announce Underwater Drone Project to Protect Sea Cables
item.description: The US, UK and Australia unveiled plans to develop underwater drone technology under their AUKUS military pact, aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defense capabilities. UK will contribute £150m with the technology expected ready by next year.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US General Holds Rare Meeting With Cuban Military Officials Near Guantanamo
item.description: US Southern Command commander met with Cuban military officials in the first such high-level meeting in recent memory, amid Cuban concerns about possible US military action.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian Region Creates New Drone Defense Ministry After Ukrainian Strikes
item.description: Russia's Nizhny Novgorod Oblast has established a new ministry dedicated to protecting against Ukrainian drone strikes, reflecting how Kyiv's attacks have changed the balance of the war.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Holds Iran Deal Meeting as US Stops Another Blockade Runner
item.description: President Trump met with top aides in the White House Situation Room to decide on extending the Iran ceasefire, while US Central Command reported stopping a Gambian-flagged cargo ship attempting to breach the Iranian port blockade—the sixth ship interdicted since April.

item.title: 🇦🇺 AUKUS Partners Announce Underwater Drone Technology Project
item.description: The US, UK and Australia unveiled a new uncrewed underwater vehicle project to protect undersea cables and enhance naval defense, with the UK contributing £150 million—the first major deliverable under AUKUS Pillar Two as the alliance seeks to counter Chinese maritime expansion.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳🇹🇼 Trump roils waters on Taiwan independence after Beijing summit
item.description: Debate over US president's China trip reveals varied interpretations of his stance on Taiwan, with Trump saying the US is "not looking to have somebody say, let's go independent."

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇺 US general holds rare meeting with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo
item.description: The first meeting in recent memory between a US Southern Command head and Cuban military officials comes amid growing concerns in Cuba about possible US military action.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia accuses Ecuador of election interference ahead of presidential vote
item.description: Colombia's foreign ministry condemned Ecuador's decision to lift tariffs after talks with a Colombian presidential candidate, calling it "deliberate interference" days before the election.

item.title: 🌍 WHO chief visits Ebola epicenter in Congo as outbreak outpaces response
item.description: WHO Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus arrived in Bunia to rally community response as the Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo strains global health resources.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Ousted Turkish opposition leader Özel draws thousands in Ankara protest
item.description: Özgür Özel, removed from office by court ruling, demonstrated strong support with a major rally in Ankara, challenging President Erdoğan's grip on power ahead of elections.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China expands digital yuan with lottery draws and fiscal spending trials
item.description: Beijing is accelerating the rollout of its central bank digital currency through expanded pilot programs, positioning the digital yuan as a potential rival to the US dollar in global finance.

item.title: 🇿🇲 Zambia clears suspected Ebola cases, steps up border screening
item.description: Zambia investigated and cleared two suspected Ebola cases while intensifying surveillance at its border with the Democratic Republic of Congo amid regional health concerns.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇯🇵 Turkey sees strong potential for drone development cooperation with Japan
item.description: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan tells Nikkei Asia that Turkey is eager to cooperate with Japan on unmanned aerial systems, including joint development and co-production of drones.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦 Hegseth promises US will find way to help Ukraine amid air defense shortage
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told reporters the US will "find a way" to help Ukraine defend itself after Zelensky sent an urgent letter to the White House about worsening air defense shortages.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚔️ US Warns It Can Resume War With Iran as Ceasefire Deal Stalls
item.description: The United States warned it is 'more than capable' of resuming military operations against Iran if a ceasefire agreement cannot be reached, amid ongoing tensions over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇦🇲🇪🇺 Russia Recalls Ambassador to Armenia Over EU Rapprochement
item.description: Russia recalled its ambassador to Armenia for consultations in protest at Yerevan's deepening ties with the European Union ahead of a crucial June 7 election, signaling mounting tensions in the South Caucasus.

item.title: 🇵🇭🇨🇳⚠️ Philippines Defense Minister Warns China Threat Persists Despite Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: The Philippines remains under 'severe threat' from China, Defense Minister said Saturday, despite recent U.S.-China tensions easing after the Trump-Xi summit earlier this month.

item.title: 🇲🇲🇮🇳🇨🇳 Myanmar Junta Chief Turned President Makes First Foreign Visit to India
item.description: Min Aung Hlaing, who transitioned from junta chief to president less than two months ago, will visit India on Saturday in his first overseas trip, with analysts noting his focus on balancing China's influence.
